name: Rory Scovel
blurb: He released the 2017 Netflix special Rory Scovel Tries Stand-Up for the First Time, executive produced by Jack White, and later specials Live Without Fear and Religion, Sex, and a Few Things in Between.
bio: Rory Scovel is an American comedian, actor, and writer from Greenville, South Carolina, whose loose, improvisational, and character-driven sets made him a critics' favorite on the alt-comedy circuit. He released the 2017 Netflix special Rory Scovel Tries Stand-Up for the First Time, executive produced by Jack White, and later specials Live Without Fear and Religion, Sex, and a Few Things in Between. As an actor he was a regular on Ground Floor and Those Who Can't and co-starred in the film I Feel Pretty.

timeline.ev: Performs first open mic in Spartanburg, South Carolina
Releases debut album Dilation; double-books Conan with Jon Dore
Releases Rory Scovel Tries Stand-Up for the First Time on Netflix
Releases Live Without Fear on YouTube
Releases Religion, Sex, and a Few Things in Between on Max

accolades: Netflix special executive produced by Jack White (2017)
Series regular on Apple TV+ drama Physical

specials.t: Rory Scovel Tries Stand-Up for the First Time
Religion, Sex, and a Few Things in Between
